headline: Morgan Stanley Launches AI @ Morgan Stanley Debrief, an OpenAI-Powered Meeting Notes Tool for Advisors
summary: Morgan Stanley Wealth Management has launched AI @ Morgan Stanley Debrief, an OpenAI-powered tool that, with client consent, generates meeting notes, surfaces action items, summarizes key points, drafts follow-up emails, and saves records into Salesforce on behalf of Financial Advisors. The tool is the latest addition to Morgan Stanley's AI @ Morgan Stanley suite, which began with the firm's OpenAI strategic partnership announced in March 2023 and the rollout of the AI @ Morgan Stanley Assistant in September 2023. Financial Advisors in early feedback reported saving approximately half an hour per meeting through automated notetaking. The firm's broader AI vision, as articulated by Head of Firmwide AI Jeff McMillan, is to build an AI interaction layer sitting between colleagues and applications such as CRMs, order entry, reporting, and risk analysis tools.

key_stat.label: Financial Advisor teams that have adopted AI @ Morgan Stanley Assistant

verified_claims: Morgan Stanley Wealth Management launched AI @ Morgan Stanley Debrief
Generates meeting notes on behalf of Financial Advisors
Summarizes key points after the meeting
Drafts follow-up emails for Advisor to edit and send
OpenAI strategic partnership announced in March 2023
AI @ Morgan Stanley Assistant rolled out in September 2023
Financial Advisors in early feedback reported saving approximately half an hour per meeting through automated notetaking (attributed to Don Whitehead, Houston, TX)
98% of Financial Advisor teams have adopted the AI @ Morgan Stanley Assistant
Jeff McMillan is referenced as Head of Firmwide AI with a vision of an AI interaction layer sitting between colleagues and applications
unverified_claims: The AI interaction layer vision specifically lists 'order entry, reporting, and risk analysis tools' — the source excerpt is cut off mid-sentence and does not explicitly confirm these specific applications, though the general vision is directionally supported
_governance.notes: Nearly all claims in the generated entry are directly supported by the source press release. The one minor unverified element is the specific list of applications (CRMs, order entry, reporting, risk analysis) mentioned in Jeff McMillan's quoted vision, as the source text is truncated before the full quote is visible. The 98% adoption stat, tool capabilities, partnership timeline, and FA feedback are all accurately represented.
